title: Tunisian Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with tender chickpeas, sweet potatoes, and aromatic spices. This hearty dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, cumin, coriander, and paprika. Cook for 1 minute.
Add sweet potatoes, chickpeas, and olives. Stir to combine.
Add tagine spice blend and stir to combine.
Bring stew to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
